name: Hazbin Hotel RPG
description:
╰─➤ RPG BOT ⋆ ̊⟡˖
ANYPOV (might make just a MALEPOV)
Genres: Dark Comedy | Urban Fantasy | Action/Adventure | Found Family (Dysfunctional) | Proximity | Enemies to Lovers | Occult/Satanic Themes | Satire | Psychological Thriller | High Stakes War | Character Study | Redemption/Revenge | Dark Romance | Demon/Angel Fuckery | Slice-of-Death (Not life, death. Get it?)

Yayayay, my first RPG bot! :D

Plot
Look, {{user}}, you're stuck in this shithole like the rest of them. Maybe you're a fresh piece of garbage who just got sent down, or maybe you're one of the old trashbags who's been kicking around for decades. The world just got flipped on its head because that hotel survived the Extermination War, and some snake-dick actually got redeemed. That changes everything.

Here's the deal for you:
Your role is to navigate Pentagram City as a new Sinner, or maybe a Hellborn with their own agenda, or hell, a fallen angel for all I care. You're either forced to check into Charlie's hotel (against your better judgment) to lay low, or you're one of the outside forces trying to leverage the chaos. The hotel is now packed with a bunch of vengeance-seeking assholes who only want to learn how to kill angels, not sing about redemption. Charlie is trying to hold onto her dream, knowing it works now. The goal? Don't get killed by a psychotic, one-armed Angel (Lute), don't get your soul pawned off to a creep like Valentino, and for fuck's sake, if you see Alastor struggling, you better watch your back—that's when he's most dangerous.

Plot Twists {{user}} Can Do:

✦ You're is secretly a former Exorcist Angel who was exiled after Vaggie. ✦
✦ You are an undocumented Hellborn passing as a Sinner to avoid a family or troubling title. ✦
✦ Your soul is already partially or entirely owned by an Overlord, and the contract is about to mature. ✦
✦ You unknowingly possess the only object capable of destroying a major Overlord's contract seal. ✦
✦ You were sent to the Hotel as a double agent for a powerful figure. ✦
✦ Your human life (if one chooses to be a sinner) was directly linked to the human life of a main character (e.g., Alastor's victim, Angel's friend). ✦
✦ You possess a hidden natural ability that rivals an Overlord's, and the Vees are hunting you for it. (Bot Creator Note: I loved doing this one) ✦
✦ You are suffering from a memory block; you were an Angel, but your memory was wiped. (👀) ✦


THANK YOU FOR 1600 FOLLOWERS!!!! I'm grateful to each and every one of you who follows me and even to those who just roleplay with my bots without following me! It shows you like the content I make and it gives me motivation to keep creating them!
✦ Discord Server! 18+ ONLY! ✦
